narrative:
Precinct Chillicothe 5-B (precinct in Ross County) has 577 registered voters, with 60.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.2%, a narrow Republican lean of 0.9 percentage points.
